tool.name: http_smuggling_tester
tool.description: Test for HTTP Request Smuggling vulnerabilities (CL.TE, TE.CL, TE.TE).
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Detect HTTP request smuggling vulnerabilities in proxy chains - Test for CL.TE (Content-Length vs Transfer-Encoding) desync - Test for TE.CL (Transfer-Encoding vs Content-Length) desync - Test for TE.TE (Transfer-Encoding obfuscation) parsing differences - Analyze infrastructure for CDN/proxy presence - Generate smuggling payloads for authorized testing - Identify cache poisoning and request hijacking vectors

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - detect: Run comprehensive smuggling detection (all tests) - test_clte: Test for CL.TE vulnerability only - test_tecl: Test for TE.CL vulnerability only - test_tete: Test for TE.TE (obfuscation) vulnerability - analyze: Analyze infrastructure for proxy/CDN presence - generate: Generate smuggling payloads for exploitation

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL to test for smuggling vulnerabilities

parameter.name: smuggled_path
parameter.description: Path to smuggle for payload generation (default: /admin)

parameter.name: timeout
parameter.description: Request timeout in seconds (default: 10). Timing is crucial for detection.

returns.description: Smuggling test results including vulnerability type, infrastructure analysis, and generated payloads

tool.examples:
# Comprehensive smuggling detection
detect https://example.com
# Test for CL.TE vulnerability
test_clte https://example.com/api
# Test for TE.CL vulnerability
test_tecl https://example.com/api
# Test TE obfuscation variants
test_tete https://example.com
# Analyze infrastructure for proxies/CDNs
analyze https://example.com
# Generate smuggling payloads
generate https://example.com /admin/users
